title: gh-146386:`modsupport.c` Missing `va_end` in `_abiinfo_raise`
author: A0su
body:
### modsupport.c: Missing va_end in _abiinfo_raise

`va_start(vargs, format)` at line 689 but `va_end(vargs)` never called on any path. UB per C99 7.15.1.

This is a sub-issue of https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/146102 with original [gist details](https://gist.github.com/devdanzin/d1a6ab9f62970be0cae139366ce3c482)

`va_end` was added at the two exit points.

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-146386 -->
* Issue: gh-146386
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body:
Most changes to Python [require a NEWS entry](https://devguide.python.org/core-developers/committing/#updating-news-and-what-s-new-in-python). Add one using the [blurb_it](https://blurb-it.herokuapp.com) web app or the [blurb](https://pypi.org/project/blurb/) command-line tool.

If this change has little impact on Python users, wait for a maintainer to apply the `skip news` label instead.
